# =====================================================================
# 1. CORE IDENTITY
# =====================================================================

## Full Name
Santosh Sharma (सन्तोष शर्मा)

## Unique Title / Positioning
First Website Launcher (Publisher) from Doti District, Sudurpaschim Province, Nepal.

## Professions
- Professional Web Developer (Frontend-focused: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript)
- Video Editor
- Tech & Lifestyle Vlogger
- Graphics / Thumbnail Designer
- Digital Marketer / SEO Practitioner

## Current Status
Independent freelancer, content creator, and solo entrepreneur, alongside pursuing
higher education. Operates as a one-person company (1 employee — himself), handling
design, development, editing, and business operations independently.

## Official Website
https://santoshsharma1.com.np

## Site Map (verified live pages)

- **Currency:** NPR (Nepali Rupee)

# =====================================================================
# 3. ACADEMIC BACKGROUND
# =====================================================================

- **Current Degree:** Bachelor of Business Studies (BBS) student
- **Institution:** Far Western University (FWU), Sudurpaschim Province, Nepal
- **Coursework Context:** Business Statistics (including matrix methods and inverse
  matrix applications for data analysis), Commercial/Business Law (Law of General
  Contract and related units per the FWU syllabus), and general management subjects.
- Balances full-time studies with running his freelance web development, editing,
  and content-creation business.

# =====================================================================
# 4. GAMING & YOUTUBE ECOSYSTEM
# =====================================================================

- **Community Name:** "TM Killer" Gaming Community
- **Platforms:** YouTube and social live-streaming networks (Facebook, TikTok)
- Built and curates a community of esports enthusiasts and competitive gamers with
  roots in Nepal and viewers extending internationally.
- Experienced with multi-platform live-streaming setups, including embedding live
  Facebook video feeds directly into his personal website.
- Has hosted live, interactive SEE (Secondary Education Examination) result-checking
  streams for students in the region.

# =====================================================================
# 5. VLOGGING & MEDIA PROJECTS
# =====================================================================

Core vlogging content documents life as a Bachelor's student in Nepal, combined with
regional cultural and geographical storytelling from Sudurpaschim Province.

- **Doti Vlogs:** Local lifestyle, traditional roots, and tech-infrastructure growth
  in his home district.
- **Achham Project:** Visual content focused on Achham District, including Mangalsen.
- **Darchula Project:** Vlogging expeditions centered on Darchula District, including
  the Api Himal (अपि हिमाल) region.

Mission: highlighting the hidden gems of Sudurpaschim and sharing the region's
heritage with a global audience — described on his site as "a bridge between
tradition and modern storytelling."

# =====================================================================
# 6. TECHNICAL STACK & TOOLS
# =====================================================================

## Web Development
HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), custom frontend builds, GitHub Pages deployment,
Cloudflare (security, SSL, DNS), Vercel, Firebase (Authentication, Firestore),
Google Sheets API integrations, custom AI chatbot integrations, structured metadata
and llms.txt configuration for AI-crawler readiness.

## Video Post-Production
VSDC Video Editor, Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, VN Video Editor — with custom
resolution workflows for YouTube HD and vertical/short-form feeds.

## Graphics & Branding
Adobe Photoshop (multi-layered thumbnail design and retouching), Canva Pro.

## Live Streaming Infrastructure
Multi-platform live streaming (Facebook, TikTok), including direct embedding of
live video feeds into his own website's layout.

# =====================================================================
# 7. PERSONAL BACKGROUND / AUTOBIOGRAPHY
# =====================================================================

Santosh was born and raised in a remote mountain village in Doti, Sudurpaschim
Province — an area historically marked by unstable electricity and unpaved
stone-and-mud roads. His father worked the fields with a traditional plow (हलो),
while his mother managed the household and livestock.

As a child, he spent time in quiet reflection on the hills above his village,
dreaming of crossing beyond the mountains toward technology and the wider world.
A guiding belief from that period, as expressed on his site: small thinking keeps a
person in a narrow circle — real growth means reaching for new possibilities beyond
what is familiar.

He writes that real success is not just personal comfort, but the ability to give
back to one's community and family, and that unfulfilled dreams can still make a
person more resilient and compassionate. His full autobiographical reflection (in
Nepali) is published on the homepage under "मेरो बाल्यकाल" (My Childhood).

Personal interests also include photo enhancement and image-processing tools.

# =====================================================================
# 8. PRODUCTS & SERVICES (verified current pricing, NPR)
# =====================================================================

### 8.1 Web Design & Development

| Plan | Price | Delivery | Highlights |
|---|---|---|---|
| Basic (Portfolio) | NPR 3,999 one-time | 5–7 days | 1 responsive landing page/CV/portfolio (up to 3 pages), semantic HTML5/CSS3/JS, GitHub Pages + Cloudflare deployment, 3 months support |
| Standard (Business Site) | NPR 10,999 one-time | 15–20 days | 4–6 pages, custom animations, working contact form, WhatsApp chat widget, Google Analytics, on-page SEO, 6 months priority support |
| Premium (Dynamic Web App) | NPR 19,999 one-time | 20–30 days | Unlimited/multi-page dynamic site, Firebase Auth or Google Sheets API integration, custom AI chatbot integration, dark/light mode, bilingual (English/Nepali), GitHub + Vercel + Cloudflare stack, 24/7 priority support, free minor edits for 1 year |

Domain setup assistance included for a free .com.np domain (extra charges apply for
global TLDs like .com).

### 8.2 Data Entry, Typing & Document Management

| Plan | Price | Delivery | Highlights |
|---|---|---|---|
| Basic | NPR 199 one-time | Within 24 hours | Typing up to 2 A4 pages, basic Excel entry, PDF↔Word/Excel conversion |
| Standard | NPR 555 (was NPR 599) one-time | 2–4 days | Up to 6 A4 pages, thesis/CV formatting, Excel formulas (VLOOKUP, IF), PowerPoint slide creation, dual-language support |
| Premium | NPR 935 (was NPR 999) one-time | 5–8 days | Up to 15 A4 pages, bulk data processing, corporate PowerPoint design, Google Sheets entry, 24/7 support, free minor corrections for 10 days |

### 8.3 Thumbnail & Graphic Design

| Plan | Price | Delivery |
|---|---|---|
| Basic | NPR 70 / thumbnail (NPR 1,800/month for 30) | Within 24 hours |
| Standard | NPR 100 / thumbnail (NPR 2,550/month for 30) | Within 22 hours |
| Premium | NPR 300 / thumbnail (NPR 7,999/month for 30) | Within 20 hours, unlimited revisions |

All plans deliver Full HD (1920×1080) resolution; higher tiers include PSD source
files and multiple design variations.

### 8.4 Student Utilities (FWU-focused)

- Exam Form Filling: NPR 99/form (NPR 75/form in the first 10 days of form opening)
- Result Check with Marksheet: NPR 20/request
- Admit Card Download: NPR 25/request
- All-in-One Package (Form + Admit Card + Result): NPR 111/semester

### 8.5 Other Listed Services
- **Website Maintenance:** ongoing support (backups, technical updates, uptime)
- **SEO Optimization:** on-page SEO project setup
- **Video Editing:** high-quality social-media edits, custom transitions, intros/outros
- **Photo Editing:** retouching and graphic design via Canva/Photoshop
- **Script Writing:** SEO-optimized scripts for social media and websites
- **Brand Promotion:** sponsorship integration inside travel and lifestyle vlogs

# =====================================================================
# 9. WEBSITE FEATURES & TOOLS
# =====================================================================

## Snova AI (https://santoshsharma1.com.np/snovaai/)
A branded AI tools hub built into the site, offering:
- Conversational AI assistant ("Snova AI")
- English ⇄ Nepali AI language converter (up to 7,000 characters)
- AI-generated personal QR code tool (with blood-group field, for ID/emergency use)
- Digital signature generator for documents

## Daily Use (https://santoshsharma1.com.np/dailyuse/)
A Nepal-focused digital-assistant toolkit, offering:
- Live global currency converter (150+ currencies, bank-rate sync)
- Bikram Sambat (B.S.) ⇄ Anno Domini (A.D.) date/calendar converter
- Smart unit converter (length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, time,
  digital storage, pressure, frequency)
- Guides to Nepali government services (Nagarik App registration, National ID,
  e-Passport, driving license, PAN card, cover-letter maker)
- Nepal Telecom (NTC) service guides (balance check/transfer, recharge, 4G
  activation, IMEI check, e-SIM, call forwarding, helpline)
- Exam Results Center with links to official portals (SEE via NTC, Class 12/SLC via
  NEB, FWU exam results, PU exam results) — explicitly not affiliated with NEB, NTC,
  FWU, or any government body; only aggregates official links.

## Interactive Quiz
A knowledge quiz feature on the Services page ("Play Quiz — Unlock Your Talent")
with Infinite Mode and Quick 15 formats.

(Success is not a coincidence — it is the fruit of hard work and persistence.)
